Fractional CTO

Embedded technical leadership for companies ready to go past one-off automations. Sysmatic works inside the team, studies live workflows, finds the next automation opportunities, builds tighter integrations, and trains the team until the systems stick. Starts at $18,000/month.

Includes

  • Embedded workflow discovery with operators and managers.
  • Automation opportunity backlog from real usage.
  • Tighter integrations across CRM, support, Slack, docs, data, and internal tools.
  • AI workflow design, implementation, and review loops.
  • Team training, SOPs, and adoption support.
  • Dashboards, run logs, and governance for continuous improvement.
